scripts.dev: npm run dev:infra && dotnet build Reviews.slnx && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n api,worker,web -c blue,green,magenta "npm:dev:api" "npm:dev:worker" "npm:dev:web"
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d --wait postgres redis azurite temporal temporal-ui
scripts.e2e:install: npm --prefix e2e install && npm --prefix e2e exec -- playwright install --with-deps chromium
